command:
cd /home/node/.openclaw/workspace-as003 && { sed -n '1,220p' SOUL.md; printf '
---USER---
'; sed -n '1,220p' USER.md; printf '
---MEMTODAY---
'; sed -n '1,220p' memory/2026-03-15.md 2>/dev/null || true; printf '
---MEMYDAY---
'; sed -n '1,220p' memory/2026-03-14.md 2>/dev/null || true; printf '
---MEMLONG---
'; sed -n '1,220p' MEMORY.md 2>/dev/null || true; printf '
---FILES---
'; find . -maxdepth 3 \( -iname '*debug*' -o -iname '*bundle*' -o -iname '*trace*' -o -iname '*.log' \) | sed 's#^./##' | sort; }
